detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BABYBIRD._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BABYBIRD.sol#745-869):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BABYBIRD.sol#809)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BABYBIRD.sol#883-895)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BABYBIRD.sol#815)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (BABYBIRD.sol#903)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYBIRD.sol#867)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BABYBIRD.sol#1029)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BABYBIRD.sol#1009)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BABYBIRD.sol#1011)
	BABYBIRD._rOwned (BABYBIRD.sol#421) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYBIRD._takeTeam(uint256) (BABYBIRD.sol#1023-1031)
	- BABYBIRD._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BABYBIRD.sol#983-1019)
	- BABYBIRD.balanceOf(address) (BABYBIRD.sol#571-575)
	- BABYBIRD.constructor() (BABYBIRD.sol#505-535)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYBIRD.sol#867)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BABYBIRD.sol#1037)
	BABYBIRD._rTotal (BABYBIRD.sol#433) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYBIRD._getCurrentSupply() (BABYBIRD.sol#1179-1189)
	- BABYBIRD._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BABYBIRD.sol#1035-1041)
	- BABYBIRD.constructor() (BABYBIRD.sol#505-535)
	- BABYBIRD.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BABYBIRD.sol#667-689)
